name: Insight At Speed Is A Friend Indeed (BlackSky Gen-3 4)
location_str: Rocket Lab LC-1A @ Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1, NZL
description: Note: Payload and customer identities were not publicly announced.  4th of the BlackSky Gen-3 high resolution Earth-imaging satellites.
rocket_fact: Rocket Lab's Rutherford engines are almost entirely 3D printed, allowing a verified engine to be built in 24 hours.
